items.title: AI for Business & Productivity
items.description: Learn how to use AI for email management, meeting notes, data analysis, customer service, marketing, and project management. Practical tips and tool recommendations for business professionals.

items.title: AI for Coding & Development
items.description: Learn how to use AI for code generation, debugging, code review, documentation, and learning to code. Includes best tools like GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, Cursor, and more.

items.title: AI for Education & Learning
items.description: Discover how to use AI for tutoring, study aids, language learning, and creating educational content. Practical tips for students, teachers, and lifelong learners.

items.title: AI for Image Generation
items.description: Learn how to use AI image generators like DALL-E, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, and Adobe Firefly. Includes prompt-writing tips and use cases for marketing, social media, and product design.

items.title: AI for Research & Analysis
items.description: Learn how to use AI for literature review, data analysis, summarization, and fact-checking. Discover the best AI tools and techniques for academic and professional research.

items.title: AI for Writing & Content Creation
items.description: Learn how to use AI for writing blog posts, copywriting, editing, social media, email drafting, and creative writing. Includes best tools, tips, and example prompts.
